snippets.title: DataAccessControlService createDataAccessLabel Sample
snippets.description: Creates a data access label. Data access labels are applied to incoming event data and selected in data access scopes (another resource), and only users with scopes containing the label can see data with that label. Currently, the data access label resource only includes custom labels, which are labels that correspond to UDM queries over event data.

snippets.title: DataAccessControlService listDataAccessLabels Sample
snippets.description: Lists all data access labels for the customer.

snippets.title: DataAccessControlService deleteDataAccessLabel Sample
snippets.description: Deletes a data access label. When a label is deleted, new data that enters in the system will not receive the label, but the label will not be removed from old data that still refers to it.

snippets.title: DataAccessControlService createDataAccessScope Sample
snippets.description: Creates a data access scope. Data access scope is a combination of allowed and denied labels attached to a permission group. If a scope has allowed labels A and B and denied labels C and D, then the group of people attached to the scope will have permissions to see all events labeled with A or B (or both) and not labeled with either C or D.

snippets.title: DataAccessControlService getDataAccessScope Sample
snippets.description: Retrieves an existing data access scope.

snippets.title: DataAccessControlService listDataAccessScopes Sample
snippets.description: Lists all existing data access scopes for the customer.

snippets.title: DataAccessControlService createDataTableRow Sample
snippets.description: Create a new data table row.

snippets.title: DataAccessControlService bulkCreateDataTableRows Sample
snippets.description: Create data table rows in bulk.

snippets.title: DataAccessControlService bulkGetDataTableRows Sample
snippets.description: Get data table rows in bulk.

snippets.title: DataAccessControlService bulkReplaceDataTableRows Sample
snippets.description: Replace all existing data table rows with new data table rows.

snippets.title: DataAccessControlService bulkUpdateDataTableRows Sample
snippets.description: Update data table rows in bulk.

snippets.title: DataAccessControlService getDataTableOperationErrors Sample
snippets.description: Get the error for a data table operation.

snippets.title: DataAccessControlService getWatchlist Sample
snippets.description: Gets watchlist details for the given watchlist ID.

snippets.title: DataAccessControlService listWatchlists Sample
snippets.description: Lists all watchlists for the given instance.

snippets.title: DataAccessControlService createWatchlist Sample
snippets.description: Creates a watchlist for the given instance. Note that there can be at most 200 watchlists per instance.

snippets.title: DataAccessControlService updateWatchlist Sample
snippets.description: Updates the watchlist for the given instance.

snippets.title: DataAccessControlService deleteWatchlist Sample
snippets.description: Deletes the watchlist for the given instance.

snippets.title: DataAccessControlService listReferenceLists Sample
snippets.description: Lists a collection of reference lists.

snippets.title: DataAccessControlService listRuleRevisions Sample
snippets.description: Lists all revisions of the rule.

snippets.title: DataAccessControlService updateRuleDeployment Sample
snippets.description: Updates a RuleDeployment. Failures are not necessarily atomic. If there is a request to update multiple fields, and any update to a single field fails, an error will be returned, but other fields may remain successfully updated.
